final_timeline_name: Misty decision rebuild from saved cut decisions (edit)

markers.name: Battle: Rival 1
markers.note: The first rival fight begins when the speaker says 'let's take on Rival number one' and Rival 1 leads with Chikorita.

markers.name: Rival 1 Battle End (Win)
markers.note: Earliest sampled frame is already post-battle overworld with finalized overlay; true transition occurred before this refine window.

markers.name: Battle: Honest Abe
markers.note: The Violet gym trainer battle begins as Honest Abe leads with level 9 Spearow.

markers.name: Honest Abe Battle End (Win)
markers.note: Sampled post-battle save/menu sequence; 534.10s maps cleanly through the edited V1 layout after nearby earlier samples fell in a cut region.

markers.name: Battle: Falkner
markers.note: The Falkner gym leader battle starts with 'straight to Falkner' and Falkner sending out his first bird.

markers.name: Falkner Battle End (Win)
markers.note: Earliest sampled frame already shows the defeated trainer/post-battle dialogue with finalized overlay.

markers.name: Battle: Jamesy Proton
markers.note: The Slowpoke Well Rocket Executive battle begins at 'Jamesy Proton attempt number one.'

markers.name: Jamesy Proton Battle End (Win)
markers.note: First sampled frame after the defeat text where the full Rocket portrait is visible, replacing the active battle UI.

markers.name: Battle: Bugsy
markers.note: The Bugsy gym leader battle begins when Bugsy attempt one starts and he leads with Metapod.

markers.name: Bugsy Battle End (Win)
markers.note: Earliest sampled frame is already post-battle gym traversal with finalized overlay; true transition occurred before this refine window.

markers.name: Battle: Rival 2
markers.note: The second rival fight starts at 'rival two attempt number one' against Gastly and Bayleaf.

markers.name: Rival 2 Battle End (Win)
markers.note: Earliest sampled frame is already post-battle overworld/progression; true transition occurred before this refine window.

markers.name: Battle: Whitney
markers.note: The Whitney gym leader battle begins when Whitney leads with Clefairy against Staryu.

markers.name: Whitney Battle End (Win)
markers.note: Earliest sampled frame shows Whitney's post-loss dialogue and the finalized overlay.

markers.name: Battle: Rival 3
markers.note: The third rival battle starts at 'Rival 3 attempt number one' with Haunter.

markers.name: Rival 3 Battle End (Gave Up)
markers.note: Earliest sampled frame is already out of battle in overworld/cave state after the give-up transition; true transition occurred before this refine window.

markers.name: Member Carousel Start
markers.note: Candidate 12 first frame is the first with the member carousel bottom strip: Ponyta sprite at lower left, LAVENDAR REGARDS name text, and a badge at lower right. Candidate 12 prev_last is normal gameplay without that overlay, so the carousel starts at V1 clip 525.
